violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Dish pit employee was handling dirty dishes at 3 comp sink, wiped hands on a "pocket" cloth and began to put away clean dishes. -Cook left line and returned and changed gloves frequently without any observed hand wash.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cloth left at prep table top at cook line. -Sani Bucket at cookline found at less than 150ppm Quat. -Made fresh bucket at dish pit and found at less than 150ppm. *Dispenser does not appear to be working well, use test strips to verify solutions and have serviced if solutions are not consistently 200-400ppm Quat solutions.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black debris at bottom edge of interior panel of ice machine.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Multiple cases of single use items on floor in basement dry storage. (single use trays, cups, paper towels, etc.)
Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. -Plastic wrapped linens stored on floor in basement storage area.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Hot hold gravy found with center temperature of 119F to edge temperature of 148. *Stir hot foods frequently to ensure internal temperature is maintained at 140F or better.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Foods in back room single door coke cooler found with ambient temp range of 42 at top to 55F at bottom shelf. *Unit appears to be over stocked. Staff moved product to other refrigeration. -Large container of whipped margarine kept at server station out of refrigeration. *Product label states must be refrigerated.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
